name: figma-ds-harness
description: Figma design-system harness with two entry points — reproduce (Figma frame → pixel-faithful React) and new-screen (brief → DS-compliant Figma generation). Shared enforcement skills (preflight, component-rules, token-binding-verify, reference-interpreter) mandate library search, instance-first reuse, and full token/variable binding (no hardcoded values).
